# DocApproval

DocApproval is a document approval workflow platform for teams. Route documents, collect digital sign-offs, track progress and audit every decision in one workspace.

## Features
- Document routing and multi-stage approval workflows
- Real-time status tracking and notifications
- Role-based access control
- Analytics and complete audit trails
- Google Sign-In

## Target users
Operations teams, legal, finance, HR, Project Managers, TPMs, Product Managers (PM), any team that routes documents for approval.

## URL
https://docapproval.vercel.app
